_sources.discrepancies: NCSL classifies MD as 'no document required' for ID. Maryland has same-day voter registration and early in-person voting. No-excuse absentee voting is available. 2026 primary date (July 21) follows standard MD schedule for midterm primaries; TODO verify exact 2026 date per State Board of Elections calendar. Registration deadline is 21 days before the election (online/mail) or same-day in person per MD law.

earlyVoting.notes: Maryland provides 8 days of early in-person voting before primary elections. TODO verify exact 2026 dates.
Maryland provides 8 days of early in-person voting before general elections. TODO verify exact 2026 dates.
Maryland offers 8 days of early in-person voting at designated vote centers. No-excuse absentee (mail) voting also available. TODO verify exact 2026 dates.

votingRules.phonesAtPollsDetail: Maryland does not prohibit phones in polling places. Voters may not photograph their ballot or other voters. Electioneering is prohibited within 100 feet of a polling place entrance.
additionalRules: No document ID required. First-time voters who registered by mail and did not provide ID at registration may need to show ID at the polls.
Closed primary: voters must be registered with a party to vote in that party's primary. Independent/unaffiliated voters may not vote in partisan primaries.
Same-day voter registration available during the early voting period and on Election Day.
No-excuse absentee voting available for all registered voters.

eligibility: Any registered voter may request an absentee ballot without providing a reason (no-excuse absentee)
voteByMail.applicationDeadline: 7 days before the election online/by mail; 4 days before in person (received by State Board of Elections or local office)
voteByMail.returnDeadline: Must be received by the local board of elections by 8 p.m. on Election Day, or postmarked by Election Day and received within 10 days after
voteByMail.returnDeadlinePlain: Must arrive by 8 p.m. on Election Day, or be postmarked by Election Day and received within 10 days after.
